creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the patch, some suggestions:

The original MASTER_SITE works for me and the checksum is valid.
http://aluigi.altervista.org/mytoolz/daa2iso.zip

How about adding this as one more backup in the MASTER_SITES?

Also this change does not need to bump PORTREVISION so we can leave it unchanged.

Finally, do you want to take maintainership of this port?
